overall.description: A first-person perspective clip from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a covered outdoor market bazaar with industrial metal mesh roofing. The scene begins with a stationary view of a seated woman, then transitions to walking forward through clothing stalls toward a vendor, featuring neon signage and a mix of natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market stall with clothing displays

agents.ego_description: standing still observing the market scene and the seated woman

notable_agents.action: woman in green sweater and red shorts sitting on folding chair looking toward camera

entered.detail: overhead industrial metal grid roof allowing dappled sunlight to filter through
black metal rack with hanging jackets and garments
white dress form torso on metal stand
flattened cardboard pieces scattered on concrete ground
large illuminated digital advertisement screen with cyan arrows
blue painted corrugated metal stall wall with hanging items

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a covered market bazaar with industrial metal mesh roofing overhead. A woman in a green sweater sits on a folding chair to the right, while clothing racks and mannequins occupy the center. Neon billboards glow in the background, and the camera remains stationary observing the sparse pedestrian traffic moving through the market.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with clothing vendor

events.description: camera begins walking forward through the market passing the seated woman
pedestrian in dark clothing walks past the camera on the right temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market toward the clothing vendor

notable_agents.action: vendor in white shirt and yellow apron standing with arms crossed near the clothing rack
customer in blue jacket and brown pants approaching the vendor from the left

entered.detail: white curtain hanging at the back of the stall area
wooden counter with boxes and merchandise displays

segments.scene_description: The camera begins walking forward, passing the seated woman and moving deeper into the covered market. The perspective shifts past clothing racks and mannequins now positioned on the left, approaching a vendor standing with arms crossed. A customer in a blue jacket walks up to the vendor as the camera continues moving through the industrial market space with its metal mesh roof and neon signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a covered industrial bazaar that shifts from a stationary observation of the market to an active walk toward a vendor. It begins with a still view of a woman in a green sweater seated beside clothing racks and mannequins under a metal mesh roof, while neon billboards glow in the background. As the camera begins to move forward, it passes the seated woman and glides deeper into the market space. The perspective then shifts past mannequins positioned on the left, moving through the industrial environment toward a vendor standing with arms crossed. Finally, the camera approaches the vendor as a customer in a blue jacket enters the frame, all beneath the persistent glow of neon signage and the overhead mesh roofing.
